title: 10 Pcs Brown Paper Bags With Handles, Small Paper Gift Bags, Eco-Friendly Kraft Shopping Carrier Bags for Wedding, Christmas, Easter, Birthday Parties & Merchandise Retail 18x24x8cm
features: Heavy Duty 130 GSM Kraft Our premium brown paper bags are made from extra-strong 130 GSM biodegradable kraft paper, offering more durability and eco-friendliness than standard paper bags. Thick material prevents tearing, protects your products and ensures worry-free carrying.

Reinforced Twisted Handles Each kraft bag features sturdy twisted handles that stay firmly in place, even when carrying heavier items. Comfortable to hold and reliable for retail packaging, takeaway orders, groceries, lunches and gift items.

Perfect for Small Businesses Ideal for boutiques, bakeries, craft sellers, cafés, takeaway shops and market stalls. These kraft bags are easy to customise with logos, stickers and stamps — helping you build a professional brand image.

Multi-Purpose for All Occasions Suitable for birthdays, parties, weddings, corporate gifting, classroom use, baby showers and everyday packaging needs. Perfect for gifting candles, cosmetics, books, snacks, clothing accessories and handmade products.

Eco-Friendly & Recyclable A plastic-free, environmentally conscious choice. Made from recyclable kraft paper with a natural matte finish. Stylish, reusable and sustainable bags for businesses and personal use.
description: Upgrade your packaging with HURUC premium kraft paper bags — made from thick 130 GSM brown kraft for superior strength, reliable carrying and a professional finish for business or personal use. Heavy-Duty Kraft Quality: Stronger than standard paper bags, the 130 GSM kraft material resists tearing and securely carries gifts, groceries, candles, clothing accessories, bakery items and small retail products. Reinforced Twisted Handles: Comfortable and durable handles stay firmly attached, making the bags perfect for shops, cafés, markets, parties and takeaway packaging. Business-Friendly Design: Ideal for boutiques, craft sellers, bakeries, restaurants and event planners. Easy to customise with logos, stickers or stamps for a branded look. Multi-Purpose for All Occasions: Perfect for birthdays, parties, weddings, baby showers, classrooms, corporate gifting and merchandise packaging. Stylish and practical for every need. Eco-Friendly & Recyclable: Made from biodegradable kraft paper with a natural finish. A sustainable alternative to plastic bags — reusable, recyclable and environmentally conscious. HURUC brown paper bags offer unbeatable value and dependable quality for businesses, events and everyday packaging.
